config.script:
'------------------------------------------------------------------ ' prosze nie dodawac funkcji fopen tutaj bo ta strona jest wykorzystywana ' jako template do generowania wynikow importu (bo ma pusty XML) '------------------------------------------------------------------
'enum2str #include "50100" 'getCurrentFirma #include "50203"
'wyswietlanie listy wz na podstawie dostarczonego kursora sub plug_wz(byref pContainer , byval cursor , nLimit )
if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Nr dok.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true
dim elem,strHli dim iter:iter = 0
for each elem in cursor iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli elem.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(elem.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(elem.idobj)+"'") pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(elem.dDataWyst)) next
end sub
'wyswietlanie listy faktur na podstawie dostarczonego kursora sub plug_faktury(byref pContainer , byval cursor , nLimit ) if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pFirma:set pFirma = getcurrentFirma()
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_SPRZEDAZ if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 1 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 1 end with
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "12 m-cy" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 1 .hli.prop(101) = 1 end with #endif
end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Netto").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER pTB.newcell.addtext("Brutto").element.bold = true with pTB.cell .align=ALIGN_CENTER .colspan = 2 end with #ifdef APPCONFIG_KARTA_KLIENTA_ORG_SPRZEDAZ 'dokument oryginalny pTB.newcell.addtext("Dok. oryginalny").element.bold = true #endif
dim pFaktura,strHli,curNetto,curBrutto,curWaluta dim iter:iter = 0 for each pFaktura in cursor iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if pTB.newrow
pTB.newcell.addtexthli pFaktura.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pFaktura.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(pFaktura.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(pFaktura.dDataWyst))
if not pFaktura.pPopSprzed is nothing then curBrutto = pFaktura.curSumaBrutto - pFaktura.pPopSprzed.curSumaBrutto curWaluta = pFaktura.curSumaWal - pFaktura.pPopSprzed.curSumaWal curNetto = pFaktura.curSumaNetto - pFaktura.pPopSprzed.curSumaNetto else curBrutto = pFaktura.curSumaBrutto curWaluta = pFaktura.curSumaWal curNetto = pFaktura.curSumaNetto end if
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(curNetto,pFirma.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(curWaluta,pFaktura.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(curBrutto,pFirma.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD #ifdef APPCONFIG_KARTA_KLIENTA_ORG_SPRZEDAZ dim pDokOryg : set pDokOryg = nothing if not pFaktura.pPopSprzed is nothing then if pFaktura.pPopSprzed.IdObj > clng(0) then set pDokOryg = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,pFaktura.pPopSprzed.IdObj) pTB.newcell.addtexthli pDokOryg.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pDokOryg.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(pDokOryg.idobj)+"'") end if else pTB.newcell.addtext("") end if #endif next end sub
'wyswietlanie listy faktur zakupu na podstawie dostarczonego kursora sub plug_zakup(byref pContainer , byval cursor , nLimit ) if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pFirma:set pFirma = getcurrentFirma() dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_ZAKUP if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 2 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 2 end with
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "12 m-cy" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 2 .hli.prop(101) = 1 end with #endif
end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Netto").element.bold = true with pTB.cell .align=ALIGN_CENTER .colspan = 2 end with pTB.newcell.addtext("Brutto").element.bold = true
pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER
#ifdef APPCONFIG_KARTA_KLIENTA_ORG_ZAKUP 'dokument oryginalny pTB.newcell.addtext("Dok. oryginalny").element.bold = true #endif
dim pZakup,strHli,curNetto,curBrutto,curWaluta dim iter:iter = 0 for each pZakup in cursor iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if
#ifdef APPCONFIG_ZAKUP_OPLATY_ZAGRANICZNE_KARTA_KLIENTA if not pZakup.pPopZakup is nothing then curBrutto = (pZakup.curSumaWal+pZakup.curSumaOplatyZagr) - (pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaWal+pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaOplatyZagr) else curBrutto = pZakup.curSumaWal+pZakup.curSumaOplatyZagr end if #else if not pZakup.pPopZakup is nothing then curBrutto = pZakup.curSumaWal - pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaWal else curBrutto = pZakup.curSumaWal end if #endif
if pZakup.n5zakup_isImportUE() or pZakup.n5zakup_isImportNieUE() then curNetto = curBrutto else if not pZakup.pPopZakup is nothing then curNetto = pZakup.curSumaNetto - pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaNetto else curNetto = pZakup.curSumaNetto end if end if
pTB.newrow
if not pZakup.pPopZakup is nothing then #ifdef APPCONFIG_ZAKUP_OPLATY_ZAGRANICZNE_KARTA_KLIENTA curWaluta = (pZakup.curSumaWal+pZakup.curSumaOplatyZagr) - (pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaWal+pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaOplatyZagr) 'pZakup.curSumaWal - pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaWal #else curWaluta = pZakup.curSumaWal - pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaWal #endif curBrutto = pZakup.curSumaBrutto - pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaBrutto curNetto = pZakup.curSumaNetto - pZakup.pPopZakup.curSumaNetto else curWaluta = curBrutto 'pZakup.curSumaWal curBrutto = pZakup.curSumaBrutto curNetto = pZakup.curSumaNetto end if
dim strText if pZakup.strNrDokObcy = "" then strText = pZakup.text else strText = pZakup.strNrDokObcy end if
pTB.newcell.addtexthli strText, _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pZakup.type)+ _ "' vn2='"+cstr(pZakup.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(pZakup.dDataWyst)) pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(curWaluta,pZakup.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(curNetto,pFirma.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(curBrutto,pFirma.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD
#ifdef APPCONFIG_KARTA_KLIENTA_ORG_ZAKUP dim pDokOryg : set pDokOryg = nothing if not pZakup.pPopZakup is nothing then if pZakup.pPopZakup.IdObj > clng(0) then set pDokOryg = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,pZakup.pPopZakup.IdObj) pTB.newcell.addtexthli pDokOryg.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pDokOryg.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(pDokOryg.idobj)+"'") end if else pTB.newcell.addtext("") end if #endif
next end sub
sub plug_platnosci(byref pContainer,byval cursor , nLimit , byval bLP , byval bPodmiot , byval bOpis , byval bStatusByFont , byval bSeparateKwoty , byval bPrzedPo , byval bFKView , byref pPage , byval nSDCtrlID , byval nDKCtrlID , byval bSolidBackground , nBorder) doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_platnosci_2 pContainer, cursor , nLimit , bLP , bPodmiot , bOpis , bStatusByFont , bSeparateKwoty , bPrzedPo , bFKView , pPage , nSDCtrlID , nDKCtrlID , bSolidBackground , nBorder, 0 end sub
'wyswietlanie listy platnosci na podstawie dostarczonego kursora sub plug_platnosci_2(byref pContainer,byval cursor , nLimit , byval bLP , byval bPodmiot , byval bOpis , byval bStatusByFont , byval bSeparateKwoty , byval bPrzedPo , byval bFKView , byref pPage , byval nSDCtrlID , byval nDKCtrlID , byval bSolidBackground , nBorder, byval iTrans)
'REV:KB: TODO wypełniać informacją z podziałem na kolumny if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
'colspan do kolumny z wpłatą dim colspan:colspan = 0
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_PLATNOSCI 'karta klienta if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 4 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 4 end with
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "12 m-cy" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 4 .hli.prop(101) = 1 end with #endif
end if end if #endif
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_NALICZENIA 'karta pracownika if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) = 3 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllNalicz" .hli.prop(100) = 3 end with
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "12 m-cy" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllNalicz" .hli.prop(100) = 3 .hli.prop(101) = 1 end with #endif end if end if #endif
dim pCellPrzed dim pElemPrzed if bPrzedPo then pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_INFO pTB.row.border = 0 set pCellPrzed = pTb.newcell.cell pTB.addtext "" pTB.newcell.addtext "Stan przed"
set pElemPrzed = pTB.newcell.addtext("").element pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if bSeparateKwoty then pTB.cell.colspan = 1 else pTB.cell.colspan = 1 end if
end if
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0
if bLP then pTB.newcell.addtext("LP").element.bold = true colspan = colspan + 1 end if
pTB.newcell.addtext("Data oper.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true colspan = colspan + 2
if bPodmiot then pTB.newcell.addtext("Podmiot").element.bold = true colspan = colspan + 1 end if
if bSeparateKwoty then pTB.newcell.addtext("Wpłata").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Wypłata").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT else pTB.newcell.addtext("Kwota").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if bOpis then pTB.newcell pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER pTB.addtext("Opis").element.bold = true pTb.element.size = clng(12) end if
if not bStatusByFont then pTB.newcell.addtext("Status").element.bold = true end if
if bFKView then pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 pTB.element.text = "Schemat dekretacji" pTB.element.bold = true
' pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 ' pTB.element.text = "Dowód księgowy" ' pTB.element.bold = true
end if
if bPrzedPo then pCellPrzed.colspan = colspan - 1 end if
dim elem dim strUnit : strUnit = ""
dim curPrzychody , curRozchody curPrzychody = ccur(0) curRozchody = ccur(0) dim curStanPrzed dim iter:iter = 0 for each elem in cursor
if elem.pRejestrDok.wrefParam1 is nothing then if not elem.pWalutaPodm is nothing then strUnit = elem.pWalutaPodm.strSkrot end if else if elem.pRejestrDok.wrefParam1.type = TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA then strUnit = elem.pRejestrDok.wrefParam1.strSkrot else if not elem.pWalutaPodm is nothing then strUnit = elem.pWalutaPodm.strSkrot end if end if end if
if bPrzedPo then if iter = 0 then curStanPrzed = elem.n5platnosc_stan(elem.pREjestrDok.idobj,elem.nNumOper) pElemPrzed.text = trans_.afc.display.money(curStanPrzed,strUnit) end if end if
iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow.row.border = nBorder
if iter mod 2 = 0 and bSolidBackground then pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if
if bStatusByFont then if elem.eStatus = N5PLATNOSC_PLANOWANA then pTB.row.italic = true else pTB.row.italic = false end if end if
if bLP then pTB.newcell.cell.bold = true pTB.addtext cstr(iter) end if
pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(elem.dDataOper) if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if
pTB.newcell.addtexthli elem.strNrDok , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(elem.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(elem.idobj)+"'")
'aby kolumny na przemian mialy inny styl dim pChangeStyle:pChangeStyle = true if bPodmiot then pTB.newcell.addtexthli " " + elem.wrefPodmiot.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(elem.wrefPodmiot.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(elem.wrefPodmiot.idobj)+"'") if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if pChangeStyle = false end if
if bSeparateKwoty then if elem.curKwotaStan > 0 then curPrzychody = curPrzychody + elem.curKwotaStan pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(elem.curKwotaStan,strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pChangeStyle then if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAP end if end if pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(ccur(0),strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pChangeStyle then if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if end if else curRozchody = curRozchody - elem.curKwotaStan pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(ccur(0),strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pChangeStyle then if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if end if pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(- elem.curKwotaStan,strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pChangeStyle then if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if end if end if if pChangeStyle then pChangeStyle = false else pChangeStyle = true end if else if iTrans=1 then 'pobież kwotę z pozycji płatności dim pozPlat, kwotaPlat for each pozPlat in elem.listPozycje if pozPlat.pTransakcja.IdObj = pPage.root.idobj then kwotaPlat = pozPlat.curPozKwotaTrans exit for end if next pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(kwotaPlat,strUnit) else pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(elem.curKwotaStan,strUnit) end if if pChangeStyle then if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if pChangeStyle = false else pChangeStyle = true end if end if pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
if bOpis then pTB.newcell.addtext " " + elem.strOpis if pChangeStyle then if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if pChangeStyle = false else pChangeStyle = true end if end if
if not bStatusByFont then pTB.newcell.addtext enum2str(TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,ENUMFLDNR_N5PLATNOSC_STATUS,elem.eStatus) if pChangeStyle then if not bSolidBackground then pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if pChangeStyle = false else pChangeStyle = true end if end if
if bFKView then
dim pUserHli
'schemat dekretacji pTB.newcell.cell.keepline = true pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE , -1 pTB.element.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SCHEMATDEKR) set pUserHli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI=row_choose_schem_dekre vn1="+cstr(iter)+"") set pTB.element.hli = pUserHli
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_EDIT , -1 #ifdef _IOW pTb.element.size=40 #else pTb.element.size=15 #endif pTb.element.border = 0
set pUserHli = doc_.createhli() pUserHli.prop(1) = clng(iter) set pTb.element.userprop = pUserHli
set pTb.element.transfer = pPage.createtransfer("custom") pTb.element.customredirect CLng(nSDCtrlID)
'dowód księgowy ' pTB.newcell.cell.keepline = true ' pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE , -1 ' pTB.element.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SCHEMATDEKR) ' set pUserHli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI=row_choose_dowod_ksieg vn1="+cstr(iter)+"") ' set pTB.element.hli = pUserHli ' ' pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_EDIT , -1 ' pTb.element.size=15 ' pTb.element.border = 0 ' ' set pUserHli = doc_.createhli() ' pUserHli.prop(1) = clng(iter) ' set pTb.element.userprop = pUserHli
' set pTb.element.transfer = pPage.createtransfer("custom") ' pTb.element.customredirect CLng(nDKCtrlID)
end if
next
if bSeparateKwoty then 'utworz wiersz podsumowania pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.row.bold = true pTB.newcell pTB.cell.colspan = colspan - 1 pTB.addtext ""
pTB.newcell.addtext "Razem" pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(curPrzychody,strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(curRozchody,strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT end if
if bPrzedPo then pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_INFO pTB.row.border = 0 pTb.newcell.cell.colspan = colspan - 1 pTB.addtext "" pTB.newcell.addtext "Stan po"
pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(curStanPrzed + curPrzychody - curRozchody ,strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if bSeparateKwoty then pTB.cell.colspan = 1 else pTB.cell.colspan = 1 end if
end if end sub
'wyswietlanie listy dekretów na podstawie dostarczonego kursora sub plug_dekret(byref pContainer,byval cursor)
if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pDekret, sumaWnAuto, sumaWnRecz, sumaMaAuto, sumaMaRecz, strUnit, bAutomat, bReczny bAutomat = false bReczny = false
#ifdef _FRAM 'gdy nie ma ręcznych dekretów przerwij procedure (FRAM) for each pDekret in cursor if pDekret.cAuto = N5_DEKRET_RECZ then bReczny = true exit for end if next
if not bReczny then exit sub end if #endif
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 #ifndef _FRAM pTB.newcell.addtext("Data księg.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Konto").element.bold = true #else pTB.newcell.addtext("Nr dokumentu").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data rejestr.").element.bold = true #endif pTB.newcell.addtext("Wn").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
#ifndef _FRAM '----- dekrety automatyczne ----- for each pDekret in cursor if pDekret.cAuto = N5_DEKRET_AUTO then bAutomat = true exit for end if next
if bAutomat then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("Dekrety automatyczne").element.bold = true with pTB.cell .align = ALIGN_CENTER .colspan = 4 end with
sumaWnAuto = 0 sumaMaAuto = 0 for each pDekret in cursor if pDekret.cAuto = N5_DEKRET_AUTO then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli pDekret.dDataKsieg, _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pDekret.type)+ _ "' vn2='"+cstr(pDekret.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT pTB.newcell.addtext(pDekret.pKonto.strSymbol) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(pDekret.curWn,pDekret.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(pDekret.curMa,pDekret.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT sumaWnAuto = sumaWnAuto + pDekret.curWn sumaMaAuto = sumaMaAuto + pDekret.curMa strUnit = pDekret.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot end if next 'utworz wiersz podsumowania pTB.newrow pTB.row.backcolor = rgb(210,220,250) pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Suma").element.bold = true with pTB.cell .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .colspan = 2 end with pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(sumaWnAuto,strUnit)).element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(sumaMaAuto,strUnit)).element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if #endif
'----- dekrety ręczne ----- for each pDekret in cursor if pDekret.cAuto = N5_DEKRET_RECZ then bReczny = true exit for end if next if bReczny then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("Dekrety ręczne").element.bold = true with pTB.cell .align=ALIGN_CENTER .colspan = 4 end with
sumaWnRecz = 0 sumaMaRecz = 0 for each pDekret in cursor if pDekret.cAuto = N5_DEKRET_RECZ then #ifndef _FRAM pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli pDekret.dDataKsieg, _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pDekret.type)+ _ "' vn2='"+cstr(pDekret.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT pTB.newcell.addtext(pDekret.pKonto.strSymbol) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT #else dim strQuery : strQuery = "select 'iddok'=p_idobj,'strnrdok'=p_strnrdok,'ddatarej'=p_ddatarej from vlist_n5dowodksieg_listDekret where c_idobj = " + CStr(pDekret.idobj) + " " dim rs : set rs = trans_.createadors(strQuery) while not rs.eof pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli rs("strnrdok"), _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG' vn2='"+cstr(rs("iddok"))+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT pTB.newcell.addtext(rs("ddatarej")) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT rs.movenext wend #endif pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(pDekret.curWn,pDekret.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(pDekret.curMa,pDekret.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT sumaWnRecz = sumaWnRecz + pDekret.curWn sumaMaRecz = sumaMaRecz + pDekret.curMa strUnit = pDekret.pKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot end if next 'utworz wiersz podsumowania pTB.newrow pTB.row.backcolor = rgb(210,220,250) pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Suma").element.bold = true with pTB.cell .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .colspan = 2 end with pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(sumaWnRecz,strUnit)).element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(sumaMaRecz,strUnit)).element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT end if
#ifndef _FRAM 'podsumowanie razem dim razemWn, razemMa razemWn = sumaWnAuto + sumaWnRecz razemMa = sumaMaAuto + sumaMaRecz pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext "Razem" with pTB.cell .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .colspan = 2 end with with pTB.element .bold = true .fontsize = 5 end with pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(razemWn,strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT with pTB.element .bold = true .fontsize = 5 end with pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(razemMa,strUnit) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT with pTB.element .bold = true .fontsize = 5 end with #endif
end sub
'----------------------------------------- 'wyswietlanie listy operacji na transakcji '----------------------------------------- sub plug_operacja(byref pContainer, byval cursor) if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable: set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef _IOW dim iter: iter = 0 dim nLimit if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 5 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 5 end with end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Data oper.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Nr dok.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Wn").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Wn rach.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma rach.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Kurs").element.bold = true
dim elem, strHli for each elem in cursor dim strSkrot: strSkrot = "" if not elem.trop_pTransakcja is nothing then if not elem.trop_pTransakcja.pWaluta is nothing then strSkrot = elem.trop_pTransakcja.pWaluta.strSkrot end if end if pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(elem.trop_dDataOp)) pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD
if not elem.trop_wrefDokument is nothing then dim strText: strText = "" select case elem.trop_wrefDokument.type case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ, TYPEID_N5ZAKUP, TYPEID_N5NOTAODS strText = elem.trop_wrefDokument.strNrDok case TYPEID_N5POZRATA strText = getNrDokPozRata(elem.trop_wrefDokument,elem.trop_pTransakcja) case TYPEID_N5POZPLATNOSC strText = getNrDokPozPlat(elem.trop_wrefDokument,elem.trop_pTransakcja) case TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE if not elem.trop_pTransakcja is nothing then strText = elem.trop_pTransakcja.strSymTrans else strText = elem.text end if case TYPEID_N5DEKRET strText = elem.trop_wrefDokument.strOpis case else strText = elem.text end select pTB.newcell.addtext strText else pTB.newcell.addtext "<brak>" end if
'kwoty pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(elem.trop_curWn,strSkrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(elem.trop_curMa,strSkrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(elem.trop_curWnEwid,"PLN")).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(elem.trop_curMaEwid,"PLN")).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(elem.trop_curKursOp,"",4)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD
'edycja trop'a pTB.newcell with pTB.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE,-1) .image=clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5POZSPRZEDAZ) .width=Clng(SIZE_FOR_GRID) .height=Clng(SIZE_FOR_GRID) .tip = "Edytuj" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "editTrop" .hli.prop(100) = CLng(elem.idobj) end with
#ifdef _IOW iter = iter + 1 if iter >= nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if #endif
next end sub
function getNrDokPozRata(pDok,pTrans): getNrDokPozRata = "" if not pDok is nothing and not pTrans is nothing then dim strSQL, oRS if pTrans.eTyp = clng(N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC) then strSQL = "select p_strnrdok from vlist_n5sprzedaz_sprzed_listRata where c_idobj = " + cstr(pDok.idobj) else strSQL = "select p_strnrdok from vlist_n5zakup_zak_listRata where c_idobj = " + cstr(pDok.idobj) end if set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) if oRS.recordCount > clng(0) then getNrDokPozRata = cstr(oRS(0).value) end if end if end function
function getNrDokPozPlat(pDok,pTrans): getNrDokPozPlat = "" if not pDok is nothing and not pTrans is nothing then dim strSQL, oRS strSQL = "select p_strnrdok from vlist_n5platnosc_listPozycje where c_idobj = " + cstr(pDok.idobj) set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) if oRS.recordCount > clng(0) then getNrDokPozPlat = cstr(oRS(0).value) end if end if end function
' funkcja zwracająca whera - listy wybory w ktorych znajduje sie obiekt ' funkcja do uzycia przy tworzeniu adors function sqlwhere_rs_lists_with_object(byval pObject) sqlwhere_rs_lists_with_object = trans_.afc.convert.Formatter("select p_idobj as IdObj,coll_lp as Lp, p_strNazwa as strNazwa from vlist_choicelist_ListElement where p_ntypeid = %2 and c_idElement = %1").add(cstr(pObject.idobj)).add(cstr(pObject.type )).done end function
sub plug_listawyboru(byref pContainer,byval pObj,nLimit)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef _FRAM if pObj.type = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then if pObj.prod_iNrFundRolny > 0 then dim oReceptura: set oReceptura = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,pObj.prod_iNrFundRolny) pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa") pTB.element.bold = true pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli oReceptura.strNazwa, doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='" + cstr(oReceptura.type) + "' vn2='" + cstr(oReceptura.idobj) + "'") end if else dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sqlwhere_rs_lists_with_object(pObj)) if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa listy").cell.colspan = 2 pTB.element.bold = true pTB.section_body dim iter:iter = 0
while not oRecordset.eof iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if
dim hli set hli=doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='delete_from_choiceList_hli'") hli.prop(100)= CLng(oRecordset.fields(0).value) hli.prop(101)= CLng(oRecordset.fields(1).value) hli.prop(102)= CLng(pObj.type)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli Cstr(oRecordset.fields(2).value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(TYPEID_CHOICELIST)+"' vn2='"+cstr(hli.prop(100))+"'") pTB.newcell.addtexthli "Usuń", hli pTB.cell.width = CLng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
oRecordset.movenext wend end if #else
dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sqlwhere_rs_lists_with_object(pObj)) if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa listy").cell.colspan = 2 pTB.element.bold = true
pTB.section_body
dim iter:iter = 0
while not oRecordset.eof
iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if
dim hli set hli=doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='delete_from_choiceList_hli'") hli.prop(100)= CLng(oRecordset.fields(0).value) hli.prop(101)= CLng(oRecordset.fields(1).value) hli.prop(102)= CLng(pObj.type)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli Cstr(oRecordset.fields(2).value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(TYPEID_CHOICELIST)+"' vn2='"+cstr(hli.prop(100))+"'") pTB.newcell.addtexthli "Usuń", hli pTB.cell.width = CLng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
oRecordset.movenext wend #endif end sub
sub plug_konta(byref pContainer,byval cursor)
if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Symbol").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa").element.bold = true
dim elem for each elem in cursor pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli elem.strSymbol , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5KONTO' vn2='"+cstr(elem.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext elem.strNazwa next
end sub
sub plug_transakcje(byref pContainer,byval cursor,nLimit)
if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_TRANSAKCJA 'karta klienta if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 3 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 3 end with
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "12 m-cy" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 3 .hli.prop(101) = 1 end with #endif
end if end if
#endif
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_NALICZENIA 'karta pracownika if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_KARTA_PRAC) = 2 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllNalicz" .hli.prop(100) = 2 end with
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "12 m-cy" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllNalicz" .hli.prop(100) = 2 .hli.prop(101) = 1 end with #endif end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Symbol").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Termin").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Winien").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addtext("Saldo").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
dim elem dim iter:iter = 0 for each elem in cursor
iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if
dim saldo:saldo = elem.curWn - elem.curMa
pTB.newrow 'na czerowno nierozliczone przeterminowane if saldo <> 0 and elem.dDataWym < trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) then pTB.row.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) end if 'przekreslenie rozliczonych if saldo = 0 then pTB.row.strike = true end if
pTB.newcell.addtexthli elem.strSymTrans , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA' vn2='"+cstr(elem.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(elem.dDataWym)
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(elem.curWn,elem.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(elem.curMa,elem.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(saldo,elem.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD next end sub
sub plug_picture(byref pContainer,byval pFile,byval nWidth,byval nHeight)
dim pPlugInTable dim pTB
if not pFile.isempty then set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) pTB.newrow.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1 with pTB.element .image = pFile .width = nWidth .height = nHeight .scalingmode = 1 end with end if
end sub
'where do tworzenia kursora po podmiocie (transakcji, platnosci) function sqlwhere_for_podmiot(byval pPodmiot , strFld) sqlwhere_for_podmiot = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " " + strFld + " = %1 and " + strFld +"_wrt = %2 ") _ .add(CStr(pPodmiot.idobj)) _ .add(CStr(pPodmiot.type)) _ .done() end function
sub plug_rezerwacje(byref pContainer,byval oCursor, nLimit) if not oCursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_REZERWACJE if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 7 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 7 end with end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data obow.").element.bold = true
dim iIter : iIter = 0 dim oRezerwacja for each oRezerwacja in oCursor iIter = iIter + 1 if iIter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow
pTB.newcell.addtexthli oRezerwacja.text , _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(oRezerwacja.type)+_ "' vn2='"+cstr(oRezerwacja.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRezerwacja.dDataWyst)) pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRezerwacja.dDataRezerw)) pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD next end sub
'wyswietlanie listy zamowien na podstawie dostarczonego kursora sub plug_zamowienia(byref pContainer , byval cursor , nLimit ) plug_zamowienia_ex pContainer , cursor , nLimit , false end sub
'wyswietlanie listy zamowien na podstawie dostarczonego kursora sub plug_zamowienia_ex(byref pContainer , byval cursor , nLimit , bDoNotCrossEmpty )
if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_ZAMOWIENIE if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 6 then nLimit = 9999 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 6 end with
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "12 m-cy" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = 6 .hli.prop(101) = 1 end with #endif
end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Termin").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Wartość").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Pozycje do realizacji").element.bold = true
dim pZamowienie,strHli dim iter:iter = 0 for each pZamowienie in cursor iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit and nLimit > 0 then exit sub end if pTB.newrow
dim nNRealCnt : nNRealCnt = pZamowienie.n5zamowienie_get_niezreal_pozcount()
'na czerowno niezrealizowanych przeterminowane if nNRealCnt <> 0 and pZamowienie.dDataReal < trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) then pTB.row.forecolor = RGB(255,0,0) end if
'przekreslenie zrealizowanych if nNRealCnt = 0 then pTB.row.strike = true if bDoNotCrossEmpty then if pZamowienie.listPozycje.count = 0 then pTB.row.strike = false end if end if end if
pTB.newcell.addtexthli pZamowienie.text , _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pZamowienie.type)+_ "' vn2='"+cstr(pZamowienie.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(pZamowienie.dDataWyst)) pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(pZamowienie.dDataReal)) pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(pZamowienie.curSumaWal,pZamowienie.pWaluta.strSkrot)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(cstr(nNRealCnt) + "/" + cstr(pZamowienie.listPozycje.count)) pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT next end sub
